title: Engine, Tasks & Workflows Functional

scope.rationale: Largest scope in Wave 5. 10+ files touched: 3 new backend services, 3 new endpoints, 3 hooks, 3 card components. Spans Engine + Tasks + Workflows.

integration.rationale: Three integration points: Engine system, Task execution system, Workflow system. All internal (no external APIs).

infrastructure.rationale: Three backend services required. Must query existing task/workflow queues. Moderate work per service.

knowledge.rationale: Requires deep understanding of Engine/Task/Workflow systems. Team familiar but complex. Progress calculation non-trivial.

risk.rationale: Moderate risk. System health indicators critical (color coding must be accurate). Queue size accuracy important. Performance impact if polling too frequent.

reasoning: COMPLEX story (18/25 pts). Largest in Wave 5 spanning 3 systems. Requires understanding Engine/Task/Workflow internals. Recommendation: Consider splitting into 2 stories (3.13a Engine, 3.13b Tasks+Workflows). Currently estimated 13-21 points (realistic). Highest technical complexity. Team familiar with patterns but implementation is substantial.
recommendation: COMPLEX — Consider splitting: 3.13a (Engine only, 5-8 pts) then 3.13b (Tasks+Workflows, 8-13 pts). Can also keep as single large story if team capacity allows. Schedule after 3.11 approval. Blocks 3.14 (Hand-offs).
